projectDescription: EducaPerú is a Peruvian tech-education platform built with Laravel that offers professional training courses (Ofimática, C++, Python) and custom web development services for individuals and businesses.
keyFeatures: Professional Ofimática course (Word, Excel, PowerPoint, Google Workspace) with 32 academic hours and 24 practical lessons
Upcoming C++ and Python programming courses for beginners to advanced learners
Custom web development service with a 4-phase methodology (Discovery, Proposal, Development, Launch)
Institutional mission and vision focused on continuing education and professional development in Peru
Responsive, dark-themed UI built with Tailwind CSS and Blade templates
Mobile-friendly navigation with animated drawer menu
Instructor profiles with downloadable CVs for course credibility
publicApiSurface: GET /capacitaciones — Course catalog listing all available and upcoming courses
GET /nosotros — About Us page (mission, vision, values)
GET /desarrollo-web — Web development service page with contact form
